title: Why doesnt ZeruelContinue on to Central Dogma
display_title: Why doesnt ZeruelContinue on to Central Dogma
wikitext:
[]: Why doesn't Zeruel...[Continue on to Central Dogma]             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:03 pm why doesn't zeruel continue onto central dogma when 01 runs out of power? 01 seemed to be done, so why waste more time with it?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:09 pm Because Zeruel is kind of an asshole like that, doing petty little things along the way because it thinks it's unstoppable. Other than that, I got nothin'.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:26 pm Because where Asuka and Rei go quiet, Shinji is still screaming inside, and Z wants him out of the way, just in case?

[]:             Quote Post by SaikiEva » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:34 pm Asuka and Rei didn't really do much damage, so when Shinji almost ripped out his head, I think Zeruel was a bit startled.

[]: Re: why doesn't zeruel             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:03 pm evaunit13 wrote: why doesn't zeruel continue onto central dogma when 01 runs out of power? 01 seemed to be done, so why waste more time with it?

[]: Re: why doesn't zeruel             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: In case someone decides to plug him back in. Duh.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:21 pm Unit 01 has a tendency to move without power. Which she did in this situation. She would have gone berserk, caught up with and disemboweled Zeruel anyway, so better to try to take her out while you still have a fighting chance.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:22 pm It's not like Big Z would have known that, though. Leliel didn't seem aware of that either.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:25 pm Unit 01 still wasn't "medically dead". If Zeruel had some way of knowing this, ve'd want to make sure to annihilate vis enemy while ve could. If Zeruel had no way of telling whether Unit 01 was alive or not, ve'd have all the more reason to be cautious.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:30 pm Unit-00 wasn't medically dead either.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:43 pm doesn't 01 usually go berserk only if Shinji's in critical danger? he wasn't going to die (immediately) until zeruel started attacking the core and cracking the plug. so if zeruel knew about it going having the ability of going berserk, why would it keep attacking 01 with the knowledge that it could go berserk.

[]: Re: why doesn't zeruel             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:47 pm evaunit13 wrote: how would they do that with nothing else the size of an eva around to do that. even if they did it by machines or something, it'd probably take long enough for zeruel to reach dogma.

[]: Re: why doesn't zeruel             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat Jun 05, 2010 9:03 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm sure they could get him plugged in quickly enough. Besides, there's not a whole lot evidence that Angels are intelligent enough to discern when exactly an Eva is unable to fight. Unit-01 could have stood to get damaged s'more. Also, it's a cartoon. The narrative demanded it.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Jun 05, 2010 9:33 pm Legendary wrote: Unit-00 wasn't medically dead either.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Sat Jun 05, 2010 10:36 pm could have just blown Unit-01 to shit with vis beam attacks.

[]: Re: why doesn't zeruel             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 10:39 pm evaunit13 wrote: 'the day tokyo-3 stood still' showed considerable effort in moving and lowering just an entry plug, so moving 01 and plugging in a cable would take a lot more manpower and time.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 10:40 pm Plus, Tokyo-3 Stood Still didn't actually USE cables because they had no electricity, and even if they did were in an enclosed space. Eva-01 is currently in a large, open space.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:07 pm The way I see it is that Zeruel is very macho and insecure. He's not used to anybody putting up a fight, so when it happened, his ego was damaged and he was very much pissed. To remedy this, in a moment of passion, he decided to tear Eva-01 to shreds in order to feel better about himself.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:25 pm Maybe he just hates Yui. Or Shinji. Both very probable.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:08 am angels aren't exactly the smartest creatures around either.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jun 05, 2010 7:09 pm Because Zeruel is kind of an asshole like that, doing petty little things
